name: Linzer Augen (Linzer Eyes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter until light and soft, then beat in sugar. Continue beating until very light.
2. Stir in the almonds, then the flour. Scrape the dough onto a piece of plastic wrap, flatten, and wrap. Chill until firm, about 1 hour.
3. Flour the dough and surface very lightly. Roll the dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
4. Cut into 3- to 4-inch rounds using a fluted cutter. Transfer to paper-lined pans and cut a 1-inch opening in half the rounds with a plain cutter.
5. Paint the almond-coated rounds with beaten egg. Sift confectioner's sugar over the bases.
6. Paint the other halves of the rounds with the preserves and adhere the sugared bases to them. Fill in the openings with more glaze.
